name: Luxury Vietnam Beach Wellness & Spa Package 2 weeks
duration: Places:Hanoi - Halong Bay - Da Nang - Hoi An - Nha Trang - Ho Chi Minh City - Mekong Delta
highlights: Embark on a luxurious cruise through the emerald waters of Halong Bay, a UNESCO World Heritage Site.
Balance your exploration with moments of relaxation, indulge in rejuvenating spa treatments and wellness activities.
Experience local life, visit exciting workshops, and enjoy the tranquility of this unique region.
Dive into the energy of Ho Chi Minh City, the bustling metropolis in southern Vietnam.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Hanoi
itinerary.description:
Morning

Arriving at the airport in Hanoi. Our driver and guide will take you to a luxury hotel for check-in. Complete the check-in procedure at 14:00. While you are waiting for lunch, amuse yourself with enjoyable activities. Afternoon/ Night

Free to explore the city, here are some of our suggestions:

Hanoi Street Food Walking Tour	FROM US $29 /pax
Hanoi Cooking Class Half Day	FROM US $48 /pax

Get in touch with our travel consultant if you are interested in these services

itinerary.title: Scenic Seaplane Flight to Halong Bay - Overnight on a Luxury Cruise
itinerary.description:
Morning

Breakfast will be prepared for you at the hotel, make your way to the airport so you may take a seaplane to Halong Bay. After the seaplane arrives in Halong, we will continue a 15-minute tour of this UNESCO World Heritage site. Halong Bay is a real wonder from above. 12:00: Welcomed by the Halong cruise, then have lunch that has already been prepared on the cruise. Afternoon

Explore activities such as kayaking, swimming, and cave visiting after lunch

itinerary.title: Back to Hanoi - Indulge in Nightlife & Foot Massage Therapy
itinerary.description:
Morning

11:00 - 11:30: Make the most of the trip by looking at natural scenes out the window and eating breakfast until we check out. Say goodbye and thanks to crew members, and move to the tender to get to Halong port. Shuttle buses will take you back to Hanoi after 2.5 hours. Afternoon

In this afternoon, visitors will have the chance to join the city night tour around 18:00. Start at the Old Quarter, you will explore the narrow streets and alleys filled with traditional shops, street vendors, and historical architecture

itinerary.title: Hanoi - Flight to Da Nang, Experience the Magical Hoi An Memories Show
itinerary.description:
Morning & Afternoon

08:00: Transfer to the airport to catch a flight to Da Nang after having breakfast at the hotel. The tour guide will pick you up and take you to the hotel in Hoi An to check in and relax for the rest of the day. Night

Enjoy spare time enjoying Hoi An night scenery. Optional: We recommend you join The Hoi An Memories Show (from US $24 /pax): The play incorporates and elevates Vietnam's famed ao dai into an artistic language, telling the story of the ancient port town. This show is a great blend of music, lighting, and visually appealing performance that will leave you with...

itinerary.title: Hoi An - Nha Trang
itinerary.description:
Morning & Afternoon

After breakfast, you will be transferred by vehicle to Da Nang Airport for a domestic flight to Nha Trang. Upon arrival, check in to your hotel and enjoy the rest of the day at your leisure. Whether it’s swimming in the clear waters, sunbathing on the beach, unwinding at a seaside bar, or simply strolling along the coast, Nha Trang offers the perfect setting to relax and recharge before the evening.

itinerary.title: Special Spa Treatment: Mud Bath in Nha Trang
itinerary.description:
Have breakfast provided by the hotel, and unwind during your free hour. Then indulge in a unique experience by taking a mud bath - an absolute must-do activity!

The deep heat from mud combined with geothermal waters has a remarkable cooling effect and aids in the relief of muscle aches and joint discomfort. Furthermore, when immersed in a mud bath, your body is totally floating in a lightweight, helpful to release your mind and body.

itinerary.title: Flight to Ho Chi Minh City - Elegant Dinner Cruise on the Saigon River
itinerary.description:
Morning 

After breakfast at the hotel, shuttle bus transportation to and from the airport from the hotel in Nha Trang without the assistance of a tour guide. After arriving in Ho Chi Minh City, you will be driven directly to your accommodation in a private vehicle. Afternoon

Free to explore the city, here are some of our suggestions:

Ho Chi Minh City Half day - Small Group	

FROM US $39/pax


Cu Chi Tunnels Half Day - Small Group	

FROM US $39/pax

If you are considering using these services, please contact our travel agent. We're here to help whenever you need us. Night

Pick up at the hot...
itinerary.accommodation: Hotel in Ho Chi Minh City

itinerary.title: Mekong Delta Day Trip On Luxury Cai Be Princess Cruise
itinerary.description:
Morning

Have breakfast at the hotel, you will be picked up at the hotel in Ho Chi Minh City to transfer to Cai Be - a Mekong Delta town in Vietnam around 08:00. After boarding the Cai Be Princess Sampan, you will be greeted by the crew with a chilly tower and a drink as the ship begins to cruise on the river and launches a new voyage to Tan Phong Islet. First, travelers will join in a cycling trip to explore the village in Tan Phong Islet. Visit the inside of the garden in the Mekong Delta, where you may purchase a limited number of fruits for a low price, and then go to one of the nearby cot...
itinerary.accommodation: Hotel in Ho Chi Minh City

itinerary.title: Ho Chi Minh City Departure
itinerary.description:
Morning

Begin your final day in Saigon with a hearty breakfast at the hotel, then relax and have fun before heading to the airport. NOTE: Please note that the hotel check-out time is at noon. A late check-out can be subject to room availability, and a surcharge will be applied. BestPrice Travel is excited to be of assistance to you on this trip. We look forward to seeing you on your next adventure.

included: All transport within Vietnam (including airport pick up & see off), as per itinerary
All in-tour stationed local English speaking guide
Spa package in Nha Trang Hotel
Foot massage in Hanoi & mud bath in Nha Trang
Domestic Flights Hanoi - Da Nang, Da Nang - Nha Trang, Nha Trang - Ho Chi Minh City
Entrance fees for Vietnam attractions, as per the itinerary
Meals as indicated in the program
